query:

('Active Member', '#22c55e', 'Regularly participates in group discussions'),
('Committee', '#3b82f6', 'AGN committee member'),

('Beta Tester', '#f59e0b', 'Signed up for TRE beta testing'),
('VIP', '#ef4444', 'Key stakeholder or influential member'),
('Inactive', '#6b7280', 'Has not been active recently');
